struct Elm { key: integer, val: integer }
struct Db { map: index<Elm[key]> }
fn check(n: integer) {
    db = Db { map: [] };
    for i in 0..n { db.map += [Elm { key: i, val: i }]; }
    for i in 0..n { db.map[i] = null; }
    cnt = 0;
    for r in db.map { cnt += 1; }
    assert(cnt == 0, "key-null remove N={n} left {cnt}");
}
fn test() {
    check(1);
    check(2);
    check(3);
    check(10);
    check(50);
    check(100);
}
